query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Alexandria
Destination: Marsa Matruh
Dates: 2026-05-09 to 2026-05-13
Budget: Balanced
Party: Family
Interests: Cultural Tourism, Festivals and Events, Cultural Exploration, Camel Riding

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan adheres to the expected JSON schema, with correct data types and structure for all fields.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The suggested Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace is located in Marsa Matruh and appears to be a suitable option for a family with a balanced budget.

results.assertion: Activities are varied and match the user's interests (history, culture, food).
results.reason: While the plan includes many cultural and historical sites and restaurant suggestions, it completely omits activities related to 'Festivals and Events' and 'Camel Riding' which were specified in the user's interests.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The estimated costs for activities, meals, and accommodation align with a 'Balanced' budget, presenting reasonable prices for a family trip in the region.

results.assertion: Transportation methods are practical and efficient for the region.
results.reason: The travel plan incorrectly states the origin city as Cairo and the return to Cairo, whereas the user explicitly requested Alexandria as the origin. Daily intra-city transportation methods are also not detailed.

results.assertion: The plan is coherent and easy to follow.
results.reason: The itinerary is well-structured by day and time, with clear titles and descriptions for each activity, making it easy to understand and follow.

judge_grader.reason: The travel plan failed to meet the origin city requirement. The user requested Alexandria as the origin, but the plan suggests Cairo.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A 5-day family trip from Cairo to Marsa Matruh, focusing on cultural sites, local experiences, and relaxation, with a balanced budget.

activities.title: Arrival and Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Arrive in Marsa Matruh and check into your comfortable accommodation at Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace, your base for exploring the city.

activities.title: Salt Cave Salman كهف الملح سلمان
activities.description: Begin your cultural journey by exploring the unique Salt Cave Salman. Enjoy its calming atmosphere and learn about its interesting history.

activities.title: Sidi El-Awwam Mosque
activities.description: Visit the impressive Sidi El-Awwam Mosque, a significant religious landmark known for its beautiful architecture and tranquil ambiance.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Savor a delicious lunch featuring a mix of local and international cuisine at New Sultana Restaurant.

activities.title: مطروح جنه وروح
activities.description: Discover this popular local spot, known for its cultural significance and lively atmosphere.

activities.title: مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓
activities.description: Experience another interesting cultural highlight, offering insights into local tourism and services.

activities.title: Dinner at Rommel House Restaurant
activities.description: Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at Rommel House Restaurant, known for its Chef's Specials.

activities.title: سيڤانا ترافيل
activities.description: Start your day exploring this popular cultural destination, offering a glimpse into local life.

activities.title: اكوا بارك كيلوباترا
activities.description: Enjoy some fun and entertainment at this local water park attraction, perfect for family enjoyment.

activities.title: Lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant
activities.description: Relish a meal at this well-regarded local restaurant, offering authentic cuisine.

activities.title: شاطئ رأس الحكمة
activities.description: Relax and enjoy the beautiful scenery of Ras El Hekma Beach, known for its clear waters.

activities.title: شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد
activities.description: Spend your late afternoon at another charming local beach, perfect for unwinding.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد
activities.description: Conclude your day with dinner featuring diverse and delicious cuisine.

activities.title: Rommel's Cave Museum
activities.description: Delve into history at this unique museum, a local favorite telling tales of wartime.

activities.title: صخرة شاطئ روميل
activities.description: Explore the famous Rommel Beach Rock, offering picturesque views and photo opportunities.

activities.title: Lunch at MR.Chick
activities.description: Grab a delicious lunch at MR.Chick, known for its tempting specialties.

activities.title: Beach
activities.description: Enjoy some leisure time by a beautiful beach in Marsa Matrouh, soaking in the sun and sea.

activities.title: جبل روميل مطروح
activities.description: Visit Rommel Mountain for scenic views and further cultural exploration of the area.

activities.title: Dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر
activities.description: Enjoy a satisfying dinner experience at MR.HUNGER, a popular spot for a good meal.

activities.title: لسان شط الغرام
activities.description: Discover this unique stretch of land, a popular local attraction with beautiful coastal scenery.

activities.title: Cleopatra Bath
activities.description: Visit the legendary Cleopatra's Bath, a historical site steeped in ancient tales.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Return to New Sultana for another delightful lunch featuring local and international cuisine.

activities.title: ممشي الافاتار avatar
activities.description: Stroll along the Avatar promenade, enjoying the vibrant atmosphere and sea views.

activities.title: ممشي باب البحر
activities.description: Take a leisurely walk along the Bab El Bahr promenade, soaking in the coastal charm.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Indulge in grilled specialties and authentic Arabic cuisine for a memorable dinner.

activities.title: ممشي الخمارى السياحى
activities.description: Begin your final day with a refreshing walk along the scenic El Khamari Tourist Walkway.

activities.title: Ava ممشي مطروح
activities.description: Explore another charming promenade, Ava Marsa Matruh Walkway, offering great views and local ambiance.

activities.title: Lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Enjoy a final taste of grilled specialties and Arabic cuisine for lunch.

activities.title: شمسيات شاطئ زمرده
activities.description: Relax under the umbrellas at Zamruda Beach, enjoying the last moments by the sea before heading home.

activities.title: مصيد koko
activities.description: A final cultural stop to cap off your Marsa Matruh experience, exploring this local attraction.

activities.title: Dinner at كبسة برقه
activities.description: Indulge in a last delicious meal featuring local and international cuisine at Kabsa Barqa.

activities.title: Departure
activities.description: After a wonderful trip, depart from Marsa Matruh back to Cairo.

budget_breakdown: Activities: EGP 4000 (EGP 200 x 4 attractions/day x 5 days)
Food: EGP 2500 (EGP 250 x 2 meals/day x 5 days)
